---
format: html
title: build_spatial_unit_frame()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>build_spatial_unit_frame</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Build Spatial Unit Frame</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Builds one animation frame for the spatial units map, drawing world
polygons, fossil pollen points, and a highlighted bounding box.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>build_spatial_unit_frame(
  data_unit,
  data_points,
  scale_label,
  data_world,
  x_limits,
  y_limits,
  buffer_degrees,
  vec_palette = NULL,
  font_family = "VT323"
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_unit">data_unit</code></td>
<td>
<p>One-row tibble with columns 'x_min', 'x_max', 'y_min', and 'y_max'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_points">data_points</code></td>
<td>
<p>Tibble with columns 'coord_long' and 'coord_lat'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="scale_label">scale_label</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Scale label shown in the upper-left corner.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_world">data_world</code></td>
<td>
<p>World polygon tibble with columns 'long', 'lat', and 'group'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="x_limits">x_limits</code></td>
<td>
<p>Numeric vector of length 2. Longitudinal map extent.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="y_limits">y_limits</code></td>
<td>
<p>Numeric vector of length 2. Latitudinal map extent.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="buffer_degrees">buffer_degrees</code></td>
<td>
<p>Numeric scalar. Buffer in degrees added around map limits.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="vec_palette">vec_palette</code></td>
<td>
<p>Optional named character vector of ORACLE colours. If 'NULL',
colours are read with 'get_oracle_palette_values()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="font_family">font_family</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Font family for all text elements.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A 'ggplot' object for one animation frame.
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
